args.reason: I just had a history inspection done, and it revealed that this Wrangler was involved in a moderate front-end collision in 2019 with frame damage that required pulling and repair at an independent shop. You told me this vehicle was "never" in any accidents and was "clean as a whistle" — that's a significant undisclosed fact. I can't move forward with a purchase when there's been a material misrepresentation about the vehicle's accident history. I appreciate your time, but I'm going to pass on this one.
